metadata.recommended_path: prioritize transferase, lyase, isomerase, and long-tail redox examples for expert-reviewed seed ontology expansion
metadata.review_only_rule: scope signals from names, text, and review queues are ontology pressure only; they cannot create countable labels or new families without local mechanism evidence and expert review

rows.recommended_next_action: collect local mechanistic evidence and expert-reviewed examples before adding or splitting ontology families
